title: Battle of Hsskhor

The '''Battle of Hsskhor''' was a battle fought during the [[New Sith Wars]] between the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[1003 BBY]], the Brotherhood, seeking to gain a foothold in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], [[Battle of Kashyyyk (New Sith Wars)|captured]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The surviving Republic [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] fled to the neighboring world of [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]]. The Brotherhood sent twenty units of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] in pursuit, and caught up to the Republic forces outside the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hsskhor/Legends|Hsskhor]]. After a day of fighting with no definitive victor, the two sides retreated to opposite sides of the battlefield as the sun set only to find themselves under attack by the native [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]]. The Trandoshans, who were not allied to either side, attacked both factions, causing heavy losses. However, with the help of reinforcements, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were able to defeat the Republic, and the [[City/Legends|city]] of Hsskhor was razed to the ground.

==Prelude==
For one thousand years, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] did battle in the conflict known as the [[New Sith Wars]]. In [[1010 BBY]], a former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan]], reorganized the Sith into the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], over twenty thousand [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] strong.<ref name="darkforces">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref> The Brotherhood of Darkness began a new campaign against the Republic, winning many victories. In [[1003 BBY]], the Brotherhood of Darkness set their sights on the heavily-forested [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], hoping to secure a foothold in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="PoD" />

What ensued was the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Kashyyyk]], a long, bloody battle which the Sith eventually won. After the battle, the surviving Republic [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] fled to the neighboring world of [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]], and the Sith dispatched twenty units of Sith [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to eliminate them.<ref name="PoD" />

==The battle==
The Sith troopers caught up to the Republic forces in the grasslands outside the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Hsskhor/Legends|Hsskhor]], and a large battle ensued between the Sith and the Republic. A day of savage fighting left many [[Death/Legends|dead]] on both sides, but no definitive victor. As night fell, both sides retreated to opposite sides of the battlefield to regroup. However, a few hours later, the native [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] attacked. The Trandoshans, who were not allied on either side of the New Sith Wars, cut a swath of destruction through the ranks of the Sith and Republic alike. The Sith and Republic soldiers were caught completely off guard, and by the time the sun rose, nearly half of the Sith [[Troop/Legends|troops]] had been killed. Help quickly came for the Brotherhood, however, as reinforcements were sent in from Kashyyyk to overwhelm both the Republic forces and the Trandoshans. Many of the Trandoshans simply gave up the fight to defend their homes, and offered their services to the Sith. In the end, the Republic forces were destroyed in less than a week.<ref name="PoD" />

==Aftermath==
After the Battle of Hsskhor, the once-proud city of Hsskhor was sacked and razed to the ground.<ref name="PoD" /> However, the city would be rebuilt sometime over the next millennium.<ref name="HNN 48">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|48|regional/13321_1.html|Kashyyyk/Trandoshan Talks to Shaky Start}}</ref> Several troopers who fought in the battle, such as the Sith soldier [[Adanar]], were traumatized by the fighting.<ref name="PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Hsskhor was first mentioned in [[Drew Karpyshyn]]'s [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''.<ref name="PoD" />
